task: US-058: Wire Deep Research Confirmation to Chat

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Backend returns error -> Error message displayed in chat
acceptance_criteria.notes: Existing error handling in MessageBubble displays error messages when message_type === 'error'

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Session ID in card matches database record
acceptance_criteria.notes: Session ID is passed directly from backend DeepResearchConfirmationCardData.session_id to component sessionId prop

lib/types/chat.ts: Added DeepResearchConfirmationCardData interface to discriminated union
Type includes card_type, session_id, topic, max_iterations matching backend format
components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx: Handle deep_research_confirmation card in renderResultCard function
Transform backend snake_case to component camelCase props

app_startup.notes: TypeScript compilation successful, no type errors preventing app startup
